Homework- Week 5

Author

Ayrianna Hedgecock

Problem 1

library(flowCore)
library(flowWorkspace)
As part of improvements to flowWorkspace, some behavior of
GatingSet objects has changed. For details, please read the section
titled "The cytoframe and cytoset classes" in the package vignette:

  vignette("flowWorkspace-Introduction", "flowWorkspace")
library(ggcyto)
Loading required package: ggplot2
Loading required package: ncdfFlow
Loading required package: BH
library(ggplot2)
library(CytoML)
library(dplyr)

Attaching package: 'dplyr'
The following object is masked from 'package:ncdfFlow':

    filter
The following object is masked from 'package:flowCore':

    filter
The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':

    filter, lag
The following objects are masked from 'package:base':

    intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
# DataFolder <- file.path("course" , "05_GatingSets" , "homeworks", "A-hedgecock-FlowCore", "data") # for actual code

 DataFolder <- file.path("data") # Quarto Rendering
fcs_files <- list.files(DataFolder, pattern = ".fcs", full.names = TRUE)
FlowJoWspFiles <- list.files(DataFolder, pattern = ".wsp", full.names = TRUE)
OpenedWorkspace <- FlowJoWspFiles[stringr::str_detect(FlowJoWspFiles, "Opened")]
OpenedWorkspace
[1] "data/FlowJoWSP_OpenedCopy.wsp"
ws <- open_flowjo_xml(file = OpenedWorkspace)
ws
File location:  data/FlowJoWSP_OpenedCopy.wsp 

Groups in Workspace
         Name Num.Samples
1 All Samples           6
fj_gs <- flowjo_to_gatingset(
    ws = ws,
    name = 1,
    path = DataFolder,
    additional.keys = "GROUPNAME"
)
plot(fj_gs)
gateList <- gs_get_pop_paths(fj_gs, path = "auto")
counts <- gs_pop_get_count_fast(fj_gs)
PercentParent <- mutate(
    counts,
    Percent_Parent = 
        round(Count / ParentCount, digits = 2)
)
FinishedDataset <- paste0("PercentParentDataset", ".csv")
StorageLocation <- file.path(DataFolder, FinishedDataset)

write.csv(PercentParent, StorageLocation, row.names = FALSE)

Problem 2

GatingSetCytoML <- flowjo_to_gatingset(
    ws,
    name = 1,
    path = DataFolder
)

Problem 3

Let’s try FlowSet…

fs <- read.flowSet(
    files = fcs_files,
    transformation = FALSE,
    truncate_max_range = FALSE
)
fs
A flowSet with 6 experiments.

column names(43): Time SSC-W ... APC-Fire 810-A AF-A
gs <- GatingSet(fs)

gs
A GatingSet with 6 samples

This is just the fcs files so no gates should be present:

plot(gs)
Error in `text.default()`:
! no coordinates were supplied
ggcyto(
    gs,
    subset = "root",
    aes(
        x = "TNFa",
        y = "IFNg"
    )
) + 
    geom_hex(bins = 128)

No data is showing?

Lets try just one file:

ggcyto(
    gs[1],
    subset = "root",
    aes(
        x = "TNFa",
        y = "IFNg"
    )
) + 
    geom_hex(bins = 128)

Okay I see data here…

2 files?

ggcyto(
    gs[c(1:2)],
    subset = "root",
    aes(
        x = "TNFa",
        y = "IFNg"
    )
) + 
    geom_hex(bins = 128)

Aha, actually data ia shown the whole time but very hard to see! The Scale is weird with the Ctrl vs SEB conditions…play around with the bins?

ggcyto(
    gs,
    subset = "root",
    aes(
        x = "TNFa",
        y = "IFNg"
    )
) + 
    geom_hex(bins = 30)

Let’s try on gated data:

ggcyto(
    fj_gs,
    subset = "Tcells",
    aes(
        x = "TNFa",
        y = "IFNg"
    )
) + geom_hex(bins = 128)

Shows overlaid groups? how to sepearate by sample? I.e. sample = row, conditions = columns?

ggcyto(
    fj_gs,
    subset = "Tcells",
    aes(
        x = "TNFa",
        y = "IFNg"
    )
) + geom_hex(bins = 128) +
    facet_grid(~name)

Not sure where to go from here… will prob learn more next week…

Made with Quarto
